violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the interior of chest freezer have an accumulation of ice. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026
Food items in in the food establishment (Frozen Fish) are lacking labels. Packaged food item must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2024
The floor in the establishment is missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/08/2024
